mapper.select: select id, user_id, screening_type_id, scheduled_for, status, created_at from screening_appointments where user_id = #{userId} and screening_type_id = #{screeningTypeId} and status = 'SCHEDULED' and scheduled_for >= #{today} order by scheduled_for asc, id asc limit 1

select id, user_id, screening_type_id, scheduled_for, status, created_at from screening_appointments where user_id = #{userId} and screening_type_id = #{screeningTypeId} and status = 'SCHEDULED' and scheduled_for >= #{today} order by scheduled_for asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into screening_appointments ( user_id, screening_type_id, scheduled_for, status, created_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{screeningTypeId}, #{scheduledFor}, #{status}, #{createdAt} )
